rationale: Single-witness MEDIUM-band T1-Synth re-scope consultation absorbed without halt; LABEL=RESCOPE_LOCKED_WITH_AMENDMENT. Amendment-1' is LOAD-BEARING-PENDING-VERIFY but is correctly downstream-gated on FIRE-A3' dual-witness fire per Amendment-4'; current absorption does not require halt. Forward path: FIRE-A2' reading-list digestion (single-witness allowed) → FIRE-A3' differentiation-check (dual-witness mandatory) → FIRE-A4' construction-draft (dual-witness mandatory). Halt would only trigger downstream at FIRE-A3' if HALT_GAP_CLOSED_AGAIN (>=3/5 existing constructions surface-preserving at d>=3) per Q-189-2 hard-fail triggers HF1-HF4.
